pi_items.source: Task description clearly states 'Set the detector ID to 'new_detector_1''. Verified absence of conflicts in existing data via code analysis of acosta_detectors.add.xml.
Task description explicitly requires setting the frequency (freq) attribute to '300'.
Task description strictly instructs to set the output file attribute to 'new_detector_output.xml'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding a new induction loop (E1) detector to the real-world Bologna Acosta network. The target parameters specified in the instructions are detector ID 'new_detector_1', frequency '300', and output file 'new_detector_output.xml'. Inspection of the initial dataset (/workspace/data/bologna_acosta/acosta_detectors.add.xml) confirms no existing detector uses this ID.
